---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Decluttr
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the frustration or limitation.

## Proposed solution

How do you think this should work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered other approaches? What are the trade-offs?

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
